cutupFfmpegCommand: ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -i INPUT.mp4 -vf "scale=1080:1920,subtitles=subtitles.ass:original_size=1080x1920" -c:v libx264 -preset fast -crf 23 -c:a aac OUT_cutup_ass.mp4
srtFfmpegCommand: ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -i INPUT.mp4 -vf "subtitles=sample-source.srt:force_style='Fontname=Vazirmatn,Alignment=2'" -c:v libx264 -preset fast -crf 23 -c:a aac OUT_srt_direct.mp4
